text:
"-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
176 E4AA E4AA_WANDERS (E4AA) Wandering Frequency CHAR 1 Mood and behavior patterns: behavioral symptoms - wandering -behavior symptom frequency. 0 = Behavior not exhibited in last 30 days, 1 = Behavior of this type occurred 1 to 3 days in last 7 days, 2 = Behavior of this type occurred 4 to 6 days, but less than daily, 3 = Behavior of this type occurred daily, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space.
177 E4AB E4AB_WANDERS_ALT (E4AB) Wandering Alterability CHAR 1 Mood and behavior
